text.title: AI Post-Mortem Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-post-mortem-template.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the incident AI-driven (prompt/model/retrieval) or infra-only?

conclusion.verdict: ROUTE — use ordinary infra post-mortem template
BLOCK — reconstruct versions OR add to action items
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
